app.name: Skim
onb.subtitle: A fast, native inbox for Windows. Bring your own AI to draft, summarize and reply in context — nothing leaves your machine.
onb.connect_subtitle: Skim syncs directly with your provider — no proxy servers, your mail never touches anyone else's cloud.
onb.oauth_note: OAuth — Skim never sees your password
onb.oauth_missing: This build has no Google client ID. Use an app password below, or paste your own client ID.
onb.oauth_setup: Use my own Google client ID
onb.or_password: or sign in with a password
onb.app_password_hint: {provider} requires an app password: enable 2-step verification, then create one in your account settings.
onb.waiting_google: Waiting for Google — finish signing in inside your browser…
ai.no_context: Nothing in your mail matches that.
ai.instruction_placeholder: Tell AI what to write — “confirm the timeline, keep it warm”…
ai.needs_key: Add your Anthropic API key in onboarding or settings to use AI.
onb.ai_subtitle: Paste an Anthropic API key to unlock AI features. Requests go straight from your machine to Claude — Skim stores the key in Windows Credential Manager and sends it nowhere else.
onb.ai_subtitle_or: One key, models from every vendor — Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok and more. Requests go straight from your machine to OpenRouter; Skim stores the key in Windows Credential Manager and sends it nowhere else.
onb.ai_no_key: No key yet? Create one in a minute at
onb.ai_key_where: Sign in → API Keys → Create Key, then paste it here. Usage is billed by Anthropic to your account.
onb.ai_key_where_or: Sign in → Keys → Create Key, then paste it here. Usage is billed by OpenRouter to your account.
onb.ai_feature_draft: Draft & reply — write in your voice
onb.ai_feature_ask: Ask in context — chat across your mail
palette.placeholder: Search mail or type a command…
compose.subject: Subject
settings.title: Settings
settings.remove_confirm: This removes the account and all locally cached mail. Mail on the server is untouched.
settings.ai_note: Your key, your bill — requests go directly to Anthropic.
settings.ai_note_or: Your key, your bill — requests go directly to OpenRouter.
settings.ai_name_hint: The AI signs and speaks as this name
settings.style_mine_hint: This goes into the AI writer's prompt — edit freely
settings.style_mine_ph: Press Rescan to distill your style from sent mail
settings.style_mine_no_sent: No sent mail to analyze yet — write a few emails first
settings.ai_instructions_ph: Facts and rules it should know — “sign as Nick”, “my company is called…”, “never use exclamation marks”
